keys.restored: Fa'afouina le fa'asao o le ki ✓ Ua fa'apipi'iina ki i le masini
keys.noBackup: E leai se fa'asao fa'ailoa mo lenei teuga
keys.missingPublicKey: O le fa'asao e leai sona ki lautele

keySetup.title: Fa'atulagaina au ki o le masini
keySetup.description: O lenei masini e le'i maua lau ki fa'alilolilo. Fa'aulu se fa'asao puipui i le upu fa'ailoa, pe fai se ki fou (e mafai ona e faitauina ni fe'au fou mai le taimi nei).
keySetup.chooseFile: Filifili se faila ma tu'u le upu fa'ailoa.
keySetup.imported: Ua fa'aulu le ki fa'alilolilo i lenei masini. E mafai ona e faitauina fe'au tuai.
keySetup.enterPassword: Tu'u lau upu fa'ailoa o le teuga ina ia mafai ona matou fa'asaoina au ki ma le saogalemu.

auth.headline: Fe'au saogalemu mo so'o se tasi, i so'o se mea
auth.description: Fa'ailoga i le pito-i-pito, fa'aliliu i le 100+ gagana, fe'au e mou, ma le telefoni/ata vitio.

feature.encryption: Fa'ailoga i le pito-i-pito e fa'aaoga i taimi uma
feature.translation: Fa'aliliu fe'au atamai ma le fa'apipi'i
feature.disappearing: Fe'au e mou ma fa'ailoga o le faitau
feature.privacy: Fa'amuamua le fa'alilo. O au fa'amatalaga, o lau pule.
feature.translate: Fa'aliliu fe'au atamai ma le fa'apipi'i

hero.line1: Fe'au saogalemu mo so'o se tasi, i so'o se mea — fa'atasi ai ma
hero.sub: Maua se numera telefoni saogalemu e leai se totogi e vala'au ma fe'au i le lalolagi atoa i le Wi-Fi po'o le data. Fiafia i le fa'ailoga i le pito-i-pito, fe'au e mou, ma le vala'au/ata vitio HD — fa'atasi ai ma meafaigaluega fa'apipi'i e fesoasoani ia te oe e tumau feso'ota'i i tuaoi.
hero.freeNote: O le vala'au ma le fe'au fa'avae e leai se totogi. O meafaigaluega AI maualuga ma fa'amanuiaga e mana'omia se fa'aleleia.

feat.encryption: Fa'ailoga i le pito-i-pito, e tumau
feat.translate: Fa'ata'atia le fa'alavelave o gagana i lau talanoaga
feat.disappear: Fe'au e mou ma fa'ailoga o le faitau
feat.privacy: Fa'amuamua le fa'alilo. O au fa'amatalaga, o lau pule.

auth.freeAccountButton: Fai se teuga e leai se totogi
auth.desktopTip: I le komepiuta? Fa'aaoga le telefoni e fa'alauiloa le app.
auth.scanHelper: I le komepiuta? Fa'aaoga le telefoni e fa'alauiloa le app.
auth.subhead: Fe'au fa'alilo, fa'ailo, ma fa'aliliu — vave.
auth.tip: Fautuaga: Fa'aaoga le teuga lava e tasi i le upega ma le telefoni. O au fe'au e tumau fa'amaopoopo.
auth.scanHint: Fa'alauiloa e fa'ala'u le app pe tatala i lau komepiuta.

registration.passwordDescription: Maualalo 6 mataitusi. Fa'aaoga se upu fa'ailoa malosi ma le tulaga ese.
registration.smsConsent: I le faia o se teuga, e te malie e maua ni fa'asalalauga SMS e fa'atatau i lau galuega Chatforia (e pei o fe'au mai isi tagata fa'aoga). O le fe'au ma le tau o le data e ono fa'aoga. E mafai ona e fa'ate'aina i so'o se taimi i le Seti.

auth.enterRecipient: Tu'u se igoa po'o se numera
auth.addRecipient: Fa'aopoopo se tagata e tali i luga e amata…
auth.oneRecipient: Fa'amolemole tu'u se tagata e tasi mo le taimi nei.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Tu'u se igoa fa'afeso'ota'i po'o se numera telefoni.
auth.sendFailed: Le mafai ona auina. Siaki le console mo fa'amatalaga.

home.title: Aiga
home.subheader: Auina atu se fe'au e amata ai se talanoaga.

chat.selectPrompt: Filifili se fe'au po'o se potu talanoaga e amata ai le talanoa
chat.emptySubtitle: Auina atu se fe'au e amata ai se talanoaga.
chat.blockConfirm: Fa'ate'aina {{name}}? E le toe maua fe'au mai ia te ia.
chat.blockError: E le mafai ona iloa se tagata e fa'ate'aina.
chat.blockFailed: Le mafai ona fa'ate'aina (e le'i fa'apipi'i le backend).
chat.unlockToView: Tatala lau ki e va'ai i lenei fe'au

messageInput.freeLimit: Tapula'a o le fuafuaga e leai se totogi: fa'amuta otometi i le 1 aso. Fa'apipi'i i le 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Maualuga fa'amuta otometi mo le Premium o le 30 aso. Fa'apipi'i i le 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Tusi se fe'au po'o fa'apipi'i se faila e auina.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Le mafai ona fa'ailoa. E le'i auina le fe'au.
messageInput.caption: Fa'amatalaga (fa'aopoopo)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Fa'apipi'i e tele tele. Taumafai se faila la'ititi.
errors.rateLimit: O lo'o e auina fe'au vave tele. Fa'amolemole fa'agesegese.
errors.validation: Sese o le fa'amaonia. Fa'amolemole siaki lau fe'au ma toe taumafai.
errors.failedToSend: Le mafai ona auina. E mafai ona toe taumafai le pusa ua le aoga.

contactList.notJoined: O lena fa'afeso'ota'i e le'i auai i Chatforia.
contactList.couldNotStart: Le mafai ona amata talanoaga. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
contactList.startFailed: Le mafai ona amata talanoaga. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
contactList.deleteFailed: Le mafai ona tape le fa'afeso'ota'i. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Le mafai ona fa'afou le igoa fa'aopoopo. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
contactList.loadFailed: Le mafai ona uta fa'afeso'ota'i. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
contactList.callStarted: O lo'o vala'au i lenei numera e ala i lau numera Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Le mafai ona amata vala'au. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.

startChatModal.title: Amata se talanoaga
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Saili igoa, igoa fa'aaoga, po'o numera telefoni
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Leai ni fa'afeso'ota'i e tutusa ma lau saili.
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: Leai ni fegalegaleaiga talu ai nei.

addContactModal.title: Fa'aopoopo fa'afeso'ota'i
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Tu'u se numera telefoni po'o igoa fa'aaoga.
addContactModal.userLookupFailed: Le mafai ona su'e le tagata fa'aoga.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: E le mafai ona fa'aopoopo oe lava ia oe.

sidebar.empty: Leai ni talanoaga i le taimi nei.

roomSearch.title: Saili i totonu o le potu
roomSearch.ariaLabel: Saili i totonu o le potu

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Leai ni mea fa'apipi'i i le masini i le taimi nei.

status.postFailed: Le mafai ona lafo le tulaga
status.filesNote: E o'o i le 5 faila. 24h e muta e leai se totogi.

voicemail.transcriptPending: O lo'o fa'aliliu le fe'au leo…
voicemail.errorLoading: Le mafai ona uta fe'au leo.
voicemail.empty: Leai ni fe'au leo i le taimi nei.
voicemail.deleteError: Le mafai ona tape le fe'au leo.
voicemail.unreadDotAria: Fa'ailoga fe'au leo e le'i faitau

profile.title: Tulaga o le Tagata Fa'aoga
profile.mustLogin: E tatau ona saini e va'ai seti.
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Fa'aali tusitusiga muamua fa'atasi ma fa'aliliu
profile.saveError: Sese: Le mafai ona sevia seti
profile.avatarError: Le mafai ona fa'ala'u le ata
profile.noPrivateKey: E leai se ki fa'alilolilo i lenei masini e fa'ala'u.
profile.setBackupPassword: Fa'atulaga se upu fa'ailoa e fa'ailoa lau fa'asao:
profile.exportFailed: Le mafai ona fa'ala'u le ki
profile.enterBackupPassword: Tu'u le upu fa'ailoa mo lenei fa'asao:
profile.importSuccess: Ua fa'aulu le ki fa'alilolilo i lenei masini.
profile.importFailed: Le mafai ona fa'aulu le ki (upu fa'ailoa sese po'o faila leaga).
profile.keysRotated: Ua fai se ki fou ma fa'ala'u le ki lautele.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Lou ki fa'alilolilo e le alu ese mai lenei masini. Fa'ala'u se kopi puipui i le upu fa'ailoa e fa'afou i se isi masini.
profile.themeFreeNotice: O lo'o e i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi—fa'aaoga Sun/Moon vave i lalo. Fa'aleleia e tatala isi ata.
profile.backupDesc: Fa'asao lau ki fa'ailoga e fa'afou ma le saogalemu au fe'au i se isi masini.
profile.privacyBlurEnabled: Fa'apupuni fe'au e leai se totogi
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Fa'apupuni pe a le'i taulai le app
profile.planLoadFailed: Le mafai ona uta lau fuafuaga.
profile.freePlanCopy: O lo'o e i le fuafuaga e leai se totogi. Fa'aleleia e tatala isi meafaigaluega e pei o fa'asao, numera fa'aopoopo, ma seti fa'alilo maualuga.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Le mafai ona tatala le portal pili. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Fa'asalalauga pe a kopi la'u fe'au
profile.followHint: O latou tala e fa'aali i lau fa'asoa Mulimuli pe a latou lafo ma le au Mulimuli (po'o Lautele).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Ua tupu se sese i lenei vaega.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Fa'asalalau vala'au ma fe'au e sau i lau telefoni po'o imeli fa'amaonia. O vala'au/fe'au e alu e mafai ona fa'aali lau numera Chatforia.
profile.destinationPhoneForCalls: Numera e alu i ai (E.164) mo vala'au
profile.errE164: Tu'u se numera telefoni E.164 e talafeagai (e.g., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Filifili auala e tasi (telefoni po'o imeli).
profile.errQuietHours: Itula filemu e tatau ona i le va o 0 ma 23.
profile.ageBandPlaceholder: Filifili lau vaega o le matua
profile.ageBandHint: Matou te sevia na'o se vaega o le matua (e le o lau aso fanau tonu). E fa'aaoga e fa'amaopoopo fa'asoa talanoaga fa'afuase'i.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Fa'aaoga fa'asoa fa'avae matua i Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Pe a fa'aaoga, matou te taumafai e fa'asoa ma tagata i vaega matua e talafeagai.
profile.partnerAgeBands: O ai e mafai ona fa'asoa ma oe?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: O talavou e fa'asoa na'o ma isi talavou. O tagata matutua e le mafai ona fa'asoa ma talavou.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Mo le saogalemu, o teuga i le vaega 13–17 e fa'asoa na'o ma isi teuga 13–17 i Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i.
profile.foriaRemember: Tu'u Ria e manatua mea e te ta'u atu
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Pe a fa'aaoga, e mafai ona fa'aaoga e Foria au talanoaga fa'afuase'i talu ai (na'o oe) e fa'aauau le talanoaga. E mafai ona e tapuni i so'o se taimi.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Fa'amuta otometi fe'au leo pe a (aso)
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Tu'u avanoa e taofi mo taimi uma
profile.voicemailForwardEmail: Fa'asalalau fe'au leo i le imeli
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Imeli e auina fa'asalalauga fe'au leo
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Fa'aaoga pe a le maua lau fa'atalanoaga leo.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Ua fa'ala'u ma le manuia le fa'atalanoaga fe'au leo
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Le mafai ona fa'ala'u fa'atalanoaga fe'au leo
profile.voicemailNote: O fe'au leo mai au numera Chatforia e sevia i lau pusa fe'au leo. E mafai ona fa'aaoga fa'aliliu ma fa'asalalau i fuafuaga e lagolagoina.
profile.portHint: E te fia taofi lau numera? E mafai ona e fa'aulu i Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Maua data telefoni mo Chatforia pe a e mamao mai le Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Pulea lau fuafuaga telefoni Chatforia, numera, fa'asalalau, ma fa'aulu numera.

options.heading: Filifili pe fa'apefea ona fa'aaoga Chatforia
options.subheading: E mafai ona e maua se numera Chatforia fou, pe aumai lau numera o lo'o i ai mai se isi kamupani.
options.portNumber: Fa'aulu lau numera o lo'o i ai i Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Fa'aulu lau numera o lo'o i ai
port.subheading: Fa'ase'e lau numera telefoni o lo'o i ai mai lau kamupani i Chatforia. Ia mautinoa e tutusa fa'amatalaga ma lau teuga kamupani e 'alo'ese ai le tuai.
port.success: Ua auina atu le talosaga fa'aulu! Matou te fa'afouina oe.

status.heading: Tulaga fa'aulu
status.subheading: Siaki tulaga o au talosaga fa'aulu numera.
status.loadError: Le mafai ona uta talosaga fa'aulu.
status.none: Leai ni galuega fa'aulu i le taimi nei.
status.submitted: Ua auina atu i le kamupani

wireless.exhausted: Ua uma lau data. Fa'atau se pusa fou e fa'aauau ai le data telefoni.

family.title: Aiga
family.loading: O lo'o uta fa'amatalaga o lau aiga…

error.load: Le mafai ona uta fa'amatalaga o le aiga.
error.invite: Le mafai ona fai se vala'au. Ia mautinoa o oe le pule o le aiga ma toe taumafai.
error.checkout: Le mafai ona amata pili mo le fuafuaga Aiga. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.

billing.myPlanError: Le mafai ona uta lau fuafuaga.
billing.freePlanCopy: O lo'o e i le fuafuaga e leai se totogi. Fa'aleleia e tatala isi meafaigaluega.
billing.portalError: Le mafai ona tatala le portal pili i le taimi nei.
billing.cancelNowHelp: E mafai ona e pulea pe fa'ate'aina lau lesitala i le portal pili, pe fa'ate'aina vave i lalo.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: E te mautinoa e te fia fa'ate'aina lau fuafuaga vave? E le mafai ona toe fa'afo'i.
billing.cancelNowError: Le mafai ona fa'ate'aina lau fuafuaga i le taimi nei. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai pe fa'aaoga Pulea pili.

none.title: Leai se aiga ua fa'atulagaina
none.body: E fai se Aiga Chatforia ma se pusa data fa'asoa, amata se fuafuaga Aiga.

data.heading: Pusa data fa'asoa
data.caption: O sui uma e fa'asoa lenei pusa. Matou te lapata'i pe a latalata i le tapula'a.

invite.title: Vala'au se sui fou
invite.body: Auina atu se imeli po'o se so'otaga e vala'au se tasi i lau pusa data aiga fa'asoa.
invite.expiryHint: O lenei so'otaga e muta pe a mavae ni aso. E mafai ona e fai se fou.

join.title: Auai i se aiga
join.body: Ua vala'auina oe e auai i se Aiga Chatforia ma fa'asoa la latou pusa data.
join.cta: Talia ma auai i le aiga
join.ctaLogin: Saini ma auai i le aiga
join.success: Ua e auai i lenei aiga. Ua e fa'asoa la latou pusa data.
join.error: Le mafai ona fa'aopoopo oe i lenei aiga. O le vala'au e le talafeagai pe ua muta.

premium.heading: Alu i Premium
premium.description: Tatala meafaigaluega malosi ma aveese fa'asalalauga.

upgrade.title: Fa'aleleia
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Amata i la matou fuafuaga e leai se totogi ma fa'asalalauga. Alu e leai se fa'asalalauga ma Plus, pe tatala meafaigaluega malosi uma ma Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Filifili se fuafuaga app, fa'aopoopo pusa data mo oe, pe fa'asoa data ma lau aiga — uma mai se nofoaga e tasi.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Amata i la matou fuafuaga e leai se totogi ma fa'asalalauga. Alu e leai se fa'asalalauga ma Plus, pe tatala meafaigaluega malosi uma ma Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Fa'aopoopo data eSIM fa'alelalolagi ina ia fa'aauau Chatforia pe a e mamao mai le Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Fai se pusa data fa'asoa mo lau aiga ma pulea fa'aaoga o tagata uma mai se nofoaga e tasi.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Tatala meafaigaluega malosi ma aveese fa'asalalauga.

scheduleBanner.title: E muta le lesitala
scheduleBanner.body: E toe foi i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi i le

free.title: Leai se totogi
free.desc: Amata fe'au e leai se totogi. Lelei pe afai o lo'o e taumafai Chatforia.

features.chat: Talanoaga 1:1 ma le vaega i le taimi tonu, fa'atasi ai ma vala'au leo ma vitio
features.media: Fa'asoa ata, fe'au leo, ma vitio pupu'u
features.ai: Tali atamai AI ma fa'aliliu vave (fa'aaoga talafeagai)
features.disappearing: Fe'au e mou ma seti fa'alilo fa'avae
features.ads: Leai se totogi mo taimi uma ma fa'asalalauga i le app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Mea uma e mana'omia, e aunoa ma fa'asalalauga. Lelei mo fe'au ma vala'au i aso uma.

features.allFree: Mea uma i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi, e aunoa ma fa'asalalauga
features.forwarding: Fa'asalalau vala'au ma fe'au i lau numera telefoni moni
features.history: Tala fe'au umi (e o'o i le 6 masina)
features.support: Fesoasoani vave pe a tupu se sese

plus.ctaPublic: Maua Plus — fa'aauau i le saini

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Masina)
premiumMonthly.desc: O le aafiaga atoa o Chatforia: meafaigaluega AI, fa'apitoa, ma fesoasoani muamua.

features.themes: Tatala ata lanu premium uma ma fa'apitoa app
features.ai: Meafaigaluega AI e na'o Premium mo toe tusitusi, tali atamai, ma aotelega
features.support: Fesoasoani muamua pe a e mana'omia tele

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Tatala Premium — fa'aauau i le saini

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Tausaga)
premiumAnnual.desc: Fa'asao atili pe a pili tausaga — fa'atasi ai ma isi ata lanu, meafaigaluega AI, ma fesoasoani muamua.

features.allPremium: Mea uma i Premium Masina — fa'atasi ai ma isi ata lanu
features.save25: Fa'asao pe tusa ma le 30% pe a fa'atusatusa i le pili masina
features.bestFor: Sili mo tagata fa'aoga malosi, tagata galulue mamao, ma tagata femalagaa'i mamafa

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Fa'asao 30% ma tausaga — fa'aauau i le saini
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Pili muamua. Fa'ate'aina i so'o se taimi. Leai ni pili natia.

marketing.freeDesc: Amata fe'au e leai se totogi.
marketing.plusDesc: Sili ona taugofie e leai se fa'asalalauga.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Meafaigaluega atoatoa, leo, ma meafaigaluega AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Fa'asao atili pe a pili tausaga.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Pili muamua. Fa'ate'aina i so'o se taimi. Leai ni pili natia.

mobile.title: Chatforia Telefoni (pusa data eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Fa'aopoopo data fa'alelalolagi e fa'aauau Chatforia e aunoa ma le Wi-Fi. O tau e fetuutuunai otometi e fa'avae i lau atunu'u ma tupe.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Filifili se pusa data fa'alelalolagi tasi e fa'aauau Chatforia pe a e femalagaa'i pe mamao mai le Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Matou te le fa'atau pusa data i lalo o le 3 GB.
mobile.localEqualsFallback: Lokal = lau atunu'u o lo'o i ai

features.throttle: E mafai ona fa'agesegese pe a mae'a fa'aaoga tele

disclaimer.devices: O pusa data eSIM e mana'omia se masini e lagolagoina eSIM ma le tatala. O le avanoa e fa'avae i le fa'ata'ita'iga telefoni, kamupani, ma le atunu'u. O le fa'asoa ma le vave e fa'avae i le itulagi.

small.title: Pusa amata
small.desc: Fa'aaofia le 3 GB data vave — lelei mo fe'au mama ma vala'au fa'ata'ita'i.
small.bestFor: Mala, fe'au mama, ma vala'au fa'ata'ita'i

medium.title: Pusa femalagaa'i
medium.desc: Fa'aaofia le 5 GB data vave mo mala, femalagaa'i, ma vala'au VoIP masani.
medium.bestFor: Mala fa'ata'ita'i, vala'au VoIP masani, ma fa'afanua

large.title: Pusa malosi
large.desc: Fa'aaofia le 10 GB data vave mo talanoaga mamafa, vala'au, ma vitio i le feso'ota'iga Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Talanoaga mamafa, vala'au, vitio, ma fa'aaoga hotspot
large.aria: Fa'atau pusa data eSIM Tagata fa'aoga malosi

compare.title: Fa'atusatusa pusa data eSIM
compare.disclaimer: O le fa'aaoga data moni e fa'avae i pe fa'apefea ona e fa'aaoga Chatforia (leo, vitio, mea, ma isi app i lau telefoni).

family.title: Aiga Chatforia (data fa'asoa)
family.subtitle: Fa'asoa se pusa data tasi i lau aiga. Pili tasi, teuga Chatforia e tele, fa'asoa fa'alelalolagi.

small.title: Aiga La'ititi
small.desc: Fa'aaofia le 20 GB data vave fa'asoa — lelei mo le 2–3 tagata fa'aoga mama.

medium.title: Aiga Tele
medium.desc: Fa'aaofia le 40 GB data vave fa'asoa — lelei mo le 3–5 sui galue malosi.

large.title: Aiga Tele
large.desc: Fa'aaofia le 80 GB data vave fa'asoa — mo aiga malosi e tumau i luga.

feature.shared: Pusa data fa'asoa mo lau aiga
feature.members: Vala'au e o'o i le 4 sui fa'aopoopo
feature.membersMore: Lelei mo le 3–5 sui galue malosi
feature.topUp: Fa'aopoopo pusa i so'o se taimi
feature.fairUse: Fa'avae i le fa'aaoga talafeagai ma tapula'a lokal

family.disclaimer: O pusa aiga e fai pe fa'aopoopo se pusa data fa'asoa. E mafai ona e vala'au ma aveese sui i so'o se taimi.
family.footnote: O pusa aiga e fa'asoa se pusa data tasi i teuga Chatforia fa'apipi'i. O le avanoa ma tapula'a e fa'avae i lau atunu'u ma tulafono lokal.

why.title: Aisea e sui ai tagata i Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia e tu'uina atu se numera telefoni moni, fa'aliliu atamai, ma se ala manino e alu e leai se fa'asalalauga pe a e sauni.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Fa'asalalauga mama i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi, se fa'aleleia Plus faigofie pe a e sauni, ma meafaigaluega Premium e le ofoina e TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App fa'aonaponei, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'alelalolagi muamua, ma fa'aliliu fa'apipi'i nai lo le fa'asalalau vala'au tuai.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs app talanoaga
messengers.body: Fe'au i numera telefoni moni — e le o isi tagata fa'aoga app — fa'atasi ai ma AI ma tulaga fa'apipi'i. Lelei pe afai o lo'o e sau mai app e pei o TextFree po'o TextMe.

feature.freeNumber: Numera telefoni e leai se totogi

why.disclaimer: Fa'atusatusaga fa'avae i fa'amatalaga lautele ma e mafai ona suia i le taimi. O isi app fe'au e leai se totogi e pei o TextFree po'o TextMe e masani lava e tutusa ma TextNow.

free.q: E moni e leai se totogi le fuafuaga e leai se totogi?
free.a: Ioe. O le fuafuaga e leai se totogi e aofia ai se numera Chatforia, vala'au, ma fe'au fa'atasi ai ma fa'asalalauga. E mafai ona e tumau i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi pe a e mana'o, pe fa'aleleia e aveese fa'asalalauga ma tatala isi meafaigaluega.

plusPremium.q: O le a le esesega i le va o Plus ma Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus e aveese fa'asalalauga ma fa'alautele lau tala fe'au — sili mo fa'aaoga i aso uma. Premium e fa'aopoopo fa'apitoa, meafaigaluega AI mo toe tusitusi ma tali, ma fesoasoani muamua mo tagata fa'aoga mamafa.

esim.q: O fea e galue ai pusa data eSIM?
esim.a: O Chatforia Telefoni e fa'aaoga fa'asoa eSIM fa'alelalolagi. O le avanoa e fa'avae i lau atunu'u ma masini. E te va'ai filifiliga e lagolagoina pe a fa'aaoga i totonu o le app.

cancel.q: E mafai ona ou fa'ate'aina pe sui fuafuaga i so'o se taimi?
cancel.a: Ioe. E mafai ona e pulea pe fa'ate'aina lau lesitala mai le itulau pili i le app. O suiga e aoga i le fa'ai'uga o lou vaitaimi pili o lo'o i ai.

family.q: O le a le auala e galue ai pusa aiga?
family.a: O pusa aiga e fai se pusa data fa'asoa i teuga Chatforia e tele. O se tasi e totogi le pili, ma e mafai ona e vala'au pe aveese sui ma fa'atulaga tapula'a mo tagata ta'itasi.

gettingStarted.title: Amata
gettingStarted.subtitle: Fou i Chatforia? O lenei ta'iala vave e fa'aali mea taua ina ia e mafai ona galue i ni minute.

alert.text: O lenei ta'iala e fa'alautele pe a matou fa'alauina meafaigaluega fou. Pe afai e misi se mea, fa'amolemole ta'u mai e ala i le

section1.title: 1) Fai lau teuga
section1.loginText: ma lau teuga o lo'o i ai.

section2.title: 2) Amata fe'au
section2.item1: Fai se DM po'o se Vaega ma auina lau fe'au muamua.
section2.item2: Fa'aaoga fa'aliliu vave e talanoa i le 100+ gagana.
section2.item3: Taumafai fe'au e mou ma fa'ailoga faitau i Tulaga → Fa'alilo.

section3.title: 3) Alu i luma
section3.item1: E mafai ona e fa'aleleia i se fuafuaga totogi i so'o se taimi i totonu o le app.
section3.item2: Pe a e saini, e mafai ona e fa'apipi'i masini fa'aopoopo ma fa'atulaga fa'asao fa'ailoa mai Seti i le app.

account.q: O le a le auala e fai ai po'o toe maua la'u teuga?
account.a: Fa'ala'u le app pe fa'aaoga le upega, tap “Fai se teuga”, fa'amaonia lau imeli/telefoni. E toe maua, fa'aaoga “Galo le upu fa'ailoa”.

privacy.q: E fa'ailo fe'au i le pito-i-pito?
privacy.a: Ioe. O fe'au ma vala'au e fa'ailo i le pito-i-pito e leai se totogi. Na'o oe ma le tagata e tali e mafai ona faitau.

translate.q: O le a le auala e galue ai le fa'aliliu vave?
translate.a: Fa'aaoga “Fa'aliliu otometi” i Seti → Fa'aaliga & Gagana. Matou te fa'aliliu i le masini pe a lagolagoina, a leai e ala i API saogalemu ma fa'amatalaga la'ititi.

contact.a: Fa'afeso'ota'i matou i support@chatforia.com. Aumai ni ata ma lau fa'ata'ita'iga app.

contact.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i Matou
contact.successMsg: Fa'afetai—o le a tali la matou 'au i le imeli.
contact.errorSend: Le mafai ona auina. Fa'amolemole imeli support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: O lenei Faiga Fa'alilo e fa'amatala pe fa'apefea ona ao, fa'aaoga, ma fa'asoa fa'amatalaga pe a e fa'aaoga a matou app ma au'aunaga. Matou te fa'ata'ita'iga Chatforia e fa'aitiitia fa'amatalaga e mafai ona matou maua.

infoWeCollect.title: Fa'amatalaga matou te ao
infoWeCollect.account: Fa'amatalaga teuga (e.g., imeli/telefoni) e fai ma puipuia lau teuga.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Mata'upu fa'ailoa (fe'au/vala'au) e fa'ailo i le pito-i-pito; e le mafai ona matou faitau.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Fa'amatalaga fa'amaonia/fa'aaoga e pei o logs sese, ituaiga masini, po'o fa'amaumauga lautele e fa'aleleia le fa'atinoga.

sms.title: Numera telefoni feavea'i ma SMS
sms.body: Pe a e filifili e tu'u se numera telefoni feavea'i, matou te fa'aaoga e fa'aaoga meafaigaluega e pei o fa'amaonia teuga, fa'asalalauga saini, ma fe'au tagata-i-tagata e ala i SMS pe a lagolagoina. Matou te auina fe'au SMS fa'atino e fa'atatau i lau teuga ma galuega i Chatforia. E mafai ona e fa'ate'aina le maua o fe'au SMS i so'o se taimi e tali atu i se upu fa'ate'aina e lagolagoina (e pei o “STOP”) pe sui au fa'atonu fa'asalalauga i le app. Matou te le fa'atau lau numera telefoni pe fa'aaoga mo maketi e le fa'atatau.
sms.enterRecipient: Tu'u se igoa po'o se numera
sms.addRecipient: Fa'aopoopo se tagata e tali i luga e amata…

howWeUse.title: Fa'apefea ona matou fa'aaoga fa'amatalaga
howWeUse.provide: Tu'u ma puipuia le au'aunaga (fa'amaonia, su'e spam/fa'aleaga).

sharing.title: Fa'asoa
sharing.body: Matou te le fa'atau fa'amatalaga patino. E mafai ona matou fa'asoa fa'amatalaga la'ititi ma tagata e gaosi (e.g., fa'asalalauga push, fa'amaumauga) i lalo o konekarate fa'apuupuu.

rights.title: Au aia tatau
rights.body: Fa'avae i lau itulagi (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), e mafai ona e talosaga avanoa, fa'asa'o, tape, pe fa'ate'aina ni fa'agaioiga. Fa'afeso'ota'i: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Taofi fa'amatalaga & saogalemu
retention.body: Matou te taofi na'o mea e mana'omia e fa'agaioi le au'aunaga ma fa'aaoga saogalemu fa'apisinisi. O mata'upu E2E e le mafai ona fa'amavae e matou.

children.title: Tamaiti
children.body: Chatforia e le fa'ata'ita'ia mo tamaiti i lalo o le 13 (po'o pe a mana'omia e lau tulafono lokal).

changes.title: Sui
changes.body: Matou te lafo fa'afouga iinei ma toe teuteu le aso “Fa'afouina talu ai”.

contact.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Pe a fa'aaoga Chatforia e te malie i nei Tulafono. Pe afai e te le malie, aua le fa'aaoga le au'aunaga.

accounts.title: Teuga
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Tu'u fa'amatalaga sa'o ma taofi fa'amaumauga saogalemu.
accounts.itemResponsibility: O oe e nafa ma galuega i lau teuga.

acceptableUse.title: Fa'aaoga talafeagai
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Leai ni mea e le talafeagai, fa'aleaga, po'o le soliga; leai ni spam po'o fa'aaoga otometi fa'aleaga.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: E mafai ona matou fa'ata'otoga/fa'ate'aina mo soliga.

sms.title: Fe'au SMS
sms.body: Pe a e tu'u se numera telefoni feavea'i, e te malie e mafai ona auina atu e Chatforia ni fe'au SMS e fa'atatau i lau teuga ma le fa'aaoga o le au'aunaga, e pei o fa'asalalauga saini, fa'asalalauga saogalemu, ma fe'au e fa'atatau i talanoaga e te amata pe auai. Matou te le fa'aaoga SMS mo fe'au fa'asalalauga po'o maketi e aunoa ma lou malie manino. O le tau o fe'au ma data e mafai ona fa'aoga. E mafai ona e fa'ate'aina fe'au SMS i so'o se taimi e tali atu i se upu fa'ate'aina e lagolagoina (mo se fa'ata'ita'iga, “STOP”) pe sui au fa'atonu fa'asalalauga i le app.

yourContent.title: Au mata'upu
yourContent.body: E te taofi aia tatau i au mata'upu. E te tu'uina mai ia matou aia tatau e mana'omia e fa'agaioi le au'aunaga (e.g., ala, teu, fa'aliliu).

disclaimer.title: Fa'amaoniga & noatia
disclaimer.body: O le au'aunaga e tu'uina atu “e pei ona i ai” e aunoa ma ni fa'amaoniga. I le tulaga atoa e fa'atagaina e le tulafono, Chatforia e le noatia mo mea e le tuusao po'o mea e mulimuli mai.

changes.title: Sui
changes.body: E mafai ona matou fa'afou nei tulafono; o le fa'aauau fa'aaoga pe a mavae suiga o lona uiga o le malie.

contact.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Aua le Fa'atau pe Fa'asoa Au Fa'amatalaga Patino
doNotSell.body: Chatforia e le fa'atau fa'amatalaga patino. O tagata nofomau Kalefonia e mafai ona auina atu talosaga i lalo o le CPRA e fa'aaoga le fa'ailoga i lalo.

cookies.title: Seti Kuki
cookies.body: Chatforia e fa'aaoga kuki la'ititi (e.g., vasega, saogalemu). Matou te le fa'aaoga kuki fa'asalalauga a isi vaega. Pulea kuki e ala i seti o lau komepiuta.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Le mafai ona uta tulaga o le numera telefoni.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Leai se numera ua tofia. Filifili se tasi e ala i le vaega numera e amata fe'au.

startChatModal.title: Amata se talanoaga
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Tusi se igoa, igoa fa'aaoga, numera telefoni, po'o imeli…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Saili e ala i igoa fa'aaoga po'o numera telefoni
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Tusi se igoa fa'aaoga po'o numera telefoni ma oomi Saili.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: O fa'amatalaga telefoni/imeli e avanoa pe a e sevia i ni fa'afeso'ota'i.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Le mafai ona amata talanoaga ma tagata ua filifilia.

sounds.freeNotice: O lo'o e i le Fuafuaga e leai se totogi — o leo premium e fa'aali ae loka. Fa'aleleia e tatala uma.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: O lenei meafaigaluega e mana'omia se fuafuaga Premium.

aiSettings.title: Seti AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Pulea fa'aliliu, tali atamai, ma tali otometi a ForiaBot.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Fa'aali tusitusiga muamua fa'atasi ma fa'aliliu
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Auina atu ni fe'au talu ai (fa'amama) i le AI e fautuaina tali vave.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Fa'apupuni upu le talafeagai i fautuaga AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Pe a fa'aaoga, o fautuaga e toe fo'i mai e le AI e fa'apupuni upu ua fa'ailoa
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Fa'aaoga tali otometi pe a ou pisi
aiSettings.saveFailed: Le mafai ona sevia seti AI
aiSettings.modeMention: Na'o pe a @fa'ailoa ia te au

accessibilitySettings.title: Fa'afaigofie & Fa'asalalauga
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Filifiliga e fa'afaigofie ai le fa'aaoga o Chatforia e aunoa ma le fa'alagolago i le leo.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSize: Tele o le mataitusi o le atina'e
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Amata i le tele masani. Fa'atele pe afai e te fiafia i tusitusiga tele i seti fa'afaigofie.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Fa'asalalauga va'aia mo fe'au & vala'au
Fa'aali fa'asalalauga ma pupuni ulutala ina ia le misia galuega.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate pe a fe'au fou (pe a lagolagoina)
Fa'aola le vibration o le masini ma fa'asalalauga.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Pupuni le lau pe a sau vala'au
Pupuni pupula puupuu pe a tatagi se vala'au.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Fa'apipi'i se fa'aliliu i fe'au leo e maua.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Fa'aali fa'asalalauga ma pupuni ulutala ina ia le misia galuega.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate pe a fe'au fou (pe a lagolagoina)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Fa'aola le vibration o le masini ma fa'asalalauga.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Pupuni le lau pe a sau vala'au
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Pupuni pupula puupuu pe a tatagi se vala'au.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Sevia na'o ciphertext i le server. Fa'ate'aina AI/Fa'aliliu ma fa'aali fa'atonu.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Masini fa'apipi'i
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Leai ni masini fa'apipi'i na maua.

help.title: Fesoasoani
help.howCanWeHelp: E mafai ona matou fesoasoani fa'apefea?

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Saili e ala i igoa fa'aopoopo, igoa, igoa fa'aaoga, po'o numera telefoni
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Ni auala vave e amata ai.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Saili e ala i telefoni / igoa fa'aaoga
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Fa'asoa lau so'otaga vala'au e amata talanoa vave.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Tumau feso'ota'i i le ala ma Chatforia mo iOS ma Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Fautuaga: O au fe'au e tumau fa'amaopoopo i le upega ma le telefoni.

randomChat.title: Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i
randomChat.description: Feiloa'i ma se tasi fou vave. Matou te fa'asoa ma tatala se potu talanoaga le tumau. Talanoa fa'alilo muamua. Fa'aopoopo Uo mulimuli ane pe a lelei.
randomChat.startingForia: O lo'o amata talanoaga ma Foria…
randomChat.noPartner: Leai se pa'aga na maua i le taimi nei.
randomChat.saveGuard: Na'o talanoaga tagata-i-tagata e mafai ona sevia
randomChat.startingRia: O lo'o amata talanoaga ma Ria…
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Matou te sevia na'o se vaega o le matua (e le o lau aso fanau tonu). E fa'aaoga e fa'amaopoopo fa'asoa talanoaga fa'afuase'i. E fa'asoa ma tagata (e le o RiaBot), fa'atulaga lau vaega matua i Seti → Matua & Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Fa'atulaga lau vaega matua i Tulaga → Matua & Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i e fa'asoa ma tagata.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: E fa'asoa ma tagata (e le o RiaBot), fa'atulaga lau vaega matua i Seti → Matua & Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i.
randomChat.subtitle: Feiloa'i ma se tasi fou vave, pe filifili e talanoa ma Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Fa'atulaga lau vaega matua i Tulaga → Matua & Talanoaga Fa'afuase'i e fa'asoa ma tagata.
